label: Thing count
description: A ThingDef with a stack count and optional stuff, quality, chance, and color overrides. Used in fixed inventory lists.

thingDef.label: Thing
thingDef.description: ThingDef of the item to include.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: ThingDef used as the material for stuff-able items.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Quality category for the item. Only applies to items that support quality.

color.label: Color
color.description: Color override for the item. Format: (r, g, b, a).

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0–1) that this item is included during generation. Defaults to 1 when omitted.
